shot_notes: Carter rams one warrior with his craft and kills the remaining two on foot.
evidence_summary: Action climax and demonstration of Carter's combat prowess.

During a solo flight, Carter encounters a skirmish between a Red Martian scout and three Green warriors. Carter rams one warrior with his craft and kills the remaining two on foot. The scout is revealed to be a relative of Than Kosis.
